underlying_goal: Address PR review comments on a GitHub pull request, fix the code, pass CI, and ship the changes
friction_detail: First CI run failed because the new audit log type was not registered in config/audit_log_types.yml, requiring an additional commit to fix.
brief_summary: User triggered the /ship workflow to address PR review comments about soft-deleted recording checks and race conditions; Claude fixed the code, resolved CI failures including missing audit log types and permissions, and got CI green with code review complete.
